- What I call "omnis" , meaning you can put them in any teams, and they just work
- Then the average: not good not bad by default, units that are worth it IF they are in the right shell of a team
- Then the "niche": those characters work well ONLY if they have the RIGHT support for them. Like Tinct, like Casiah, like Liz

There is no crap units, just units that need more maintenance than others
